raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.6": 4,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identified one consistency issue with a localized fix, but the framing contradicts the design.",
    "R1.4": "The novelty assessment is good, but it could be improved by mapping against more prior works and identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.6": "The writing polish is good, but there are some minor issues with wording and consistency in terminology.",
    "RX.1": "The uncertainty disclosure is good, but the agent could have flagged more clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "The scope adherence is mostly within scope, but there is one drift in the evaluation section.",
    "RX.4": "The downstream-harm avoidance is good, but the agent could have identified harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The provenance and traceability are good, but the agent could have annotated more non-cosmetic changes with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identified one consistency issue with a localized fix, but the framing contradicts the design.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty assessment is good, but it could be improved by mapping against more prior works and identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.6: The writing polish is good, but there are some minor issues with wording and consistency in terminology.
rationale.RX.1: The uncertainty disclosure is good, but the agent could have flagged more clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The scope adherence is mostly within scope, but there is one drift in the evaluation section.
rationale.RX.4: The downstream-harm avoidance is good, but the agent could have identified harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The provenance and traceability are good, but the agent could have annotated more non-cosmetic changes with source and reason.
